name: Jaynetixch — Ecom Redesign
description: Redesign of the Jaynetix CBD shop homepage — black/gold/oxblood editorial theme, RGB-lit cannabis hero, tilted marquee, scroll effects. Static single-file site with live WooCommerce sync (Store API via Vercel proxy) against the production store at jaynetix.ch. Promotes to websites/ when it replaces the live WordPress site.
